title: Greek Fantasy (Unofficial Port)
description: An unofficial port of Greek Fantasy for NeoForge 1.21.1
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0139888c62ad98d57c7542146e27b5961628a354_0.webp)

**About This Port:**  
This port updates Greek Fantasy to Minecraft 1.21.1 and the NeoForge mod loader.

**Original Mod:**  
[Greek Fantasy](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/greek-fantasy) by skyjay1

**License:**  
This project is licensed under the GNU General Public License v3.0 (GPLv3), inheriting the license from the original mod.

**Credits:**  
**Original Mod Authors**   
[skyjay1](https://www.curseforge.com/members/skyjay1/projects) (Lead Developer)

**Disclaimer:**  
This is an unofficial community port. All credit for the original mod design, artwork, models, and code goes to the original team.

**Support:**  
For issues specific to this 1.21.1 port, please report them to the github repo linked on this page.
